section.title: What my clients say
section.subtitle: Real feedback from real families I've helped in Halifax.

items.name: Sarah M.
items.quote: Vaibhav found us our dream home in just three weeks. He knew exactly what we wanted even before we did. Couldn't recommend him more highly!

items.name: James R.
items.quote: Selling our family home was emotional, but Vaibhav made the whole process smooth and stress-free. He got us above asking price — his negotiation skills are unreal.

items.name: Priya K.
items.quote: As first-time buyers, we had a million questions. Vaibhav patiently walked us through everything and never once made us feel rushed. Absolute gem of a realtor.

items.name: Vaibhav's Mom
items.quote: He is the best realtor in all of Halifax. I should know — I'm his mother. But seriously, he treats every client like family. I'm very proud.
